Departments

Counseling

Clinical counseling and mental health support to help patients and families navigate the emotional recovery journey.

Book AssessmentWhatsApp
Specialities
StrokeHemiplegiaSpinal Cord InjuryTraumatic Brain InjuryQuadriplegia & ParaplegiaPost-Surgical ComplicationsMotor Neuron DiseasesCerebral PalsyParkinson's DiseaseMyopathyMuscular DystrophyDisc & Spine ProblemsSciaticaObesityPost-Covid ComplicationsOsteoarthritisRheumatoid ArthritisDevelopmental DelayPsychological ProblemsAutismPsychiatry
OVERVIEW

Counseling: Compassionate Support for Mind & Spirit

A medical journey — whether recovering from stroke, living with a chronic neurological condition, or facing a life-altering disability — is not only a physical experience. It profoundly affects emotions, relationships, identity, and sense of purpose. Compassionate, skilled counseling is essential to support both patients and families through these challenges.

At Ayurgreen Hospital, professional counseling is provided as an integral component of all rehabilitation programs — not as a separate service to be requested, but as a proactive, embedded dimension of care. Our trained counselors and clinical psychologists routinely screen all patients and families for psychological needs and provide responsive, personalized support.

Our counseling services bridge the gap between the clinical expertise of our medical team and the human experience of our patients and families — ensuring that the emotional, relational, and spiritual dimensions of recovery receive the same expert attention as the physical dimensions.

COUNSELING FOCUS AREAS

What Our Counselors Address

Compassionate, professional counseling for the emotional, relational, and psychological challenges of illness and rehabilitation.

Patient Emotional Support

Addressing the depression, anxiety, grief, loss, fear, anger, and adjustment challenges that accompany sudden disability, chronic illness, and long rehabilitation journeys.

Family & Relationship Counseling

Supporting families through the significant stress, role changes, relationship strain, and grief that accompanies caring for a family member with serious illness or disability.

Caregiver Wellbeing & Burnout Prevention

Dedicated caregiver support addressing the burden, burnout, compassion fatigue, and depression that commonly affect those caring for neurologically impaired family members.

COUNSELING SERVICES

Comprehensive Counseling Services

Professional, compassionate counseling integrated within our rehabilitation programs for patient and family wellbeing.

1

Individual Patient Counseling

One-to-one counseling sessions addressing the emotional impact of sudden disability, the grief of lost function and independence, adjustment to changed life roles and relationships, motivation and engagement in rehabilitation, fear of the future, and spiritual and existential questions that arise in serious illness. Person-centered, solution-focused, and CBT approaches used flexibly to meet each patient's needs.

2

Family & Caregiver Counseling

Structured family sessions facilitated by our counselors: understanding the patient's diagnosis and what to realistically expect from recovery; managing changed family dynamics, roles, and responsibilities; communication strategies that support the patient's autonomy and dignity; financial planning implications of long-term care; and managing sibling and extended family relationships when a family member has serious illness.

3

Sattvavajaya (Ayurvedic Mind Counseling)

Ayurveda's Sattvavajaya Chikitsa — psychological healing through self-knowledge, positive thinking, and spiritual alignment — complements modern counseling with ancient wisdom. Practices including Svadhyaya (self-reflection), positive affirmation (Mantra recitation), and guidance on Ayurvedic lifestyle for mental wellbeing (Dinacharya, Sadvritta) provide a culturally resonant framework for psychological healing alongside modern counseling.

4

Group Support & Peer Support Programs

Structured therapeutic support groups for stroke survivors, brain injury patients, spinal cord injury patients, and caregivers — providing peer connection, shared experience, mutual support, and practical advice from those who truly understand the challenges. Group therapy reduces isolation, builds community, and accelerates the adjustment process through shared narrative and collective wisdom.

COUNSELING APPROACHES

Counseling Approaches & Support Tools

Evidence-based counseling techniques integrated with Ayurvedic psychological approaches for complete emotional support.

Person-Centered Counseling

Carl Rogers-based person-centered approach providing unconditional positive regard, empathic understanding, and genuine therapeutic presence — the foundation of effective counseling.

CBT & Solution-Focused Approaches

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for depression and anxiety; Solution-Focused Brief Therapy for practical problem-solving; Motivational Interviewing for rehabilitation engagement.

Sattvavajaya Chikitsa

Ayurvedic psychological healing through self-knowledge, Mantra therapy, and positive lifestyle guidance — providing a culturally resonant complement to Western counseling approaches.

Peer Support Groups

Facilitated peer support groups for stroke, SCI, TBI, and caregiver populations — reducing isolation and accelerating psychological adjustment through shared experience.

Spiritual & Existential Support

Sensitive support for the spiritual and existential questions that arise in serious illness — working with the patient's own faith tradition and spiritual framework to find meaning, hope, and peace.

RECOVERY TIMELINE

Your Recovery Journey

Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

1. Assessment

Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel.

2. Diagnosis

Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors.

3. Personalized Plan

Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols.

4. Therapy

Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments.

5. Monitoring

Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data.

6. Recovery

Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan.

COMMON QUERIES

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to key details about the Counseling program.

Our recovery protocol for Counseling combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains.

Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways.

Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists.

All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state.

Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care.

A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon.

Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains.

You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly.

Start Your Recovery Journey Today

Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

Book Consultation WhatsApp Call Now

India's pioneer in Integrated Ortho-Neuro Rehabilitation, fusing cutting-edge robotic tech with traditional Kerala Ayurveda to restore movement and dignity.
